series_metadata.series_title: BSI - SL Corporate Applications; Orders; and Requests for Regulatory Approval
series_metadata.series_description: These files contain information related to corporate applications, orders, and requests for regulatory approval with the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions and related agreements, exhibits and correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness ; Microform: microfilm five (5) years dissolution of an institution ; Electronic: electronic copy five (5) years dissolution of an institution
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
